# Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 | Machine Learning | Pune — Apply Now
...
📅 Posted: Jun 19, 2026 🔗 Direct Apply 📍 Pune, Maharashtra, India 🏢 Eaton
...
Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 is hiring motivated AI/ML engineering graduates in Pune. Eaton is looking for freshers with a strong academic foundation in AI/ML who are eager to apply theory to real-world business problems under mentorship. As part of this Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 programme, you will work with senior AI/ML engineers, data scientists and platform teams to build and operationalize machine learning solutions on enterprise-scale data platforms.
...
## Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 – Full Job Details
...
| Company | Eaton |
| --- | --- |

| Location | Pune, Maharashtra, India |

| Experience | Apprentice (Fresher) |

...
Eaton is an intelligent power management company that helps customers manage power safely, efficiently and sustainably. Eaton’s Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML) team builds enterprise-scale ML solutions, and its India centre in Pune offers apprentices strong mentorship and hands-on exposure to real AI/ML engineering.
...
## Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 – Role Overview
...
In the Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 role, you will assist in building and training machine learning models for structured and unstructured data use cases, perform data analysis, preprocessing and feature engineering on large datasets, support experimentation using AutoML and custom ML approaches, and evaluate model performance, assisting in tuning for accuracy and robustness.
...
- Assist in building and training ML models for structured and unstructured data
- Perform data analysis, preprocessing and feature engineering on large datasets
- Support experimentation using AutoML and custom ML approaches
- Evaluate model performance and assist in tuning for accuracy and robustness
- Work with AI/ML platform and data teams under mentorship
...
## Eligibility Criteria
...
- B.E / B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science or CS (with strong AI/ML coursework)
- Strong fundamentals in ML algorithms, statistics and linear algebra
- Good knowledge of data structures and basic algorithms
- Working knowledge of Python; familiarity with scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch
- Basic understanding of SQL and working with datasets
...
The Eaton AI ML Apprentice 2026 role values Python, machine learning algorithms, statistics, scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch, SQL and data handling, with cloud (Azure/AWS/GCP), Snowflake and ML lifecycle exposure as good-to-haves.
...
Eaton offers a competitive apprenticeship stipend with strong mentorship from senior AI/ML engineers and hands-on exposure to enterprise ML platforms. The exact stipend is shared during the hiring process.
...

results.title: Eaton Off Campus Recruitment 2026: IT Apprentice Jobs in Pune
highlights:
Eaton Off Campus Recruitment 2026 has opened a promising doorway for fresh engineering graduates who want to begin their careers in artificial intelligence and machine learning. The company is hiring for the Apprentice-IT position (Job Req ID 63005) at its Pune, Maharashtra office in a hybrid work model. The role sits inside Eaton’s AI/ML engineering team, where apprentices learn to build and operationalise machine learning solutions on enterprise-scale data platforms under the mentorship of senior engineers and data scientists. If you completed a B.E. or B.Tech with AI/ML coursework and want structured, hands-on exposure rather than a generic support role, this opening deserves a serious look.
...
| Company | Eaton |
| --- | --- |
| Job Role | Apprentice – IT (AI/ML) |
| Job ID | 63005 |
| Job Category | Information Technology |
| Qualification | B.E. / B.Tech (AI, ML, Data Science, or CSE with AI/ML coursework) |
| Experience | Freshers (0-2 years) |
| Job Location | Pune, Maharashtra |
| Work Mode | Hybrid |
| Job Schedule | Full-time apprenticeship |
| Salary | ₹3.0 – ₹4.5 LPA (industry estimate) |
| Posting Date | June 2026 |
| Hire Eligibility | 2025/2026 graduates with strong AI/ML fundamentals |
| Last Date | Apply early; open until filled |
...
The Apprentice-IT role is positioned inside Eaton’s Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML) team. Unlike generic IT support apprenticeships, this one is explicitly an AI/ML engineering track: you will assist in building and training machine learning models, work on data preprocessing and feature engineering for large datasets, and support experimentation using both AutoML and custom ML approaches.
...
You will collaborate with senior AI/ML engineers, data scientists, and platform teams to translate business problems into ML tasks, evaluate model performance, and document experiments clearly. Eaton also emphasises responsible AI, data governance, and security practices, so apprentices learn how production ML is governed and monitored in a regulated enterprise environment — a skill set many freshers only encounter years into their careers.
...
- Assist in building and training ML models for structured and unstructured data use cases.
- Perform data analysis, preprocessing, and feature engineering on large datasets.
- Support experimentation using AutoML as well as custom machine learning approaches.
- Evaluate model performance and help tune models for accuracy and robustness.
- Work with enterprise AI/ML platforms and tools for model development.
- Partner with engineers and analysts to convert business problems into ML tasks.
- Document experiments, learnings, and model outcomes for the wider team.
- Follow responsible AI, data governance, and security best practices.
...
- B.E. / B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, or Computer Science with strong AI/ML coursework.
- Solid fundamentals in ML algorithms, statistics, linear algebra, and data structures.
- Working knowledge of Python and libraries such as scikit-learn, with basic exposure to TensorFlow or PyTorch.
- Basic understanding of SQL and comfort working with datasets.
...

results.title: Eaton Recruitment Hiring Graduates Freshers for Apprentice IT (Data Management) - KickCharm
highlights:
Eaton Recruitment Hiring Graduates Freshers for Apprentice IT. Exciting Job opportunity for freshers looking to start their career as an apprentice. Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to improving the quality of life and protecting the environment for people everywhere. So, below here are the Eaton Job description, Eligibility, and details.
...
Company Name: Eaton
...
Job Role: Apprentice IT
...
## Eaton Recruitment
...
### Job Description
...
- Fresher Salary
- Support development and maintenance of MDM solutions on modern cloud platforms (Snowflake preferred)
- Assist in implementing Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold layers) for structured data processing
- Write and optimize SQL queries for data transformation, validation, and analysis
- Participate in data modeling and data architecture discussions
- Support data quality, cleansing, and standardization initiatives
- Assist in building data pipelines, streamlit apps and workflows
...
- Explore and prototype GenAI-driven use cases in data management (e.g., intelligent matching, enrichment, automation)
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data stewards, business stakeholders, and engineering teams
- Document technical designs, transformations, and best practices
...
- Basic understanding of SQL (joins, aggregations, transformations)
- Familiarity with Data Warehousing concepts
- Knowledge of Snowflake or any cloud data platform (preferred)
- Understanding of Data Architecture fundamentals
- Awareness of Medallion Architecture (Bronze-Silver-Gold layers)
- Basic knowledge or interest in Generative AI (GenAI) concepts and applications
- Exposure to ETL/ELT processes is a plus
- Certification or coursework in Snowflake, Data Engineering, or AI/ML
- Hands-on academic or project experience in data-related domains
- Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
- Good communication skills (ability to explain technical concepts clearly)

...
# Lead Engineer- Advanced Computational Methods for Power Systems
...
- Eaton’s CTO Corporate Technology Office division is currently seeking a Lead Engineer- Advanced Computational Methods for Power Systems. This position will be remote.
...
- In this role, you will help shape the future of energy systems by developing advanced computational methods and exploring emerging technologies like quantum-inspired algorithms and machine learning to improve grid resilience and efficiency. Working with cloud-based platforms and collaborating with partners using cutting-edge quantum hardware, you’ll lead projects that bridge innovation and practical impact for sustainable power solutions.
...
- The ERL is a corporate R&D function within Eaton's Chief Technology Office, responsible for innovative and breakthrough technology development and commercialization for Eaton products and service solutions. This position will lead the R&D of advanced computing techniques to enhance energy resilience for the electric grid and connected energy systems. The Lead Engineer will report to Technology Manager and help identify key technical gaps and influence technology roadmap for Eaton’s products and services. This work will help businesses across Eaton solve critical business problems and uncover new business opportunities.
...
- Required (Basic) Qualifications:
- PhD degree or PhD candidate within 6 months to graduation in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field from an accredited institution, OR
- Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field from an accredited institution plus 3 years of industrial experience, OR
- Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field from an accredited institution plus 5 years of industrial experience.
- Preferred Qualifications

results.title: Demand Planner | Jobflarely
highlights:
# Demand Planner
...
- Eaton’s Data Center division is currently seeking a Demand Planner to join our team. This position is hybrid with preference for this person to be in Raleigh NC or Woodridge, IL. Will consider remote within the US.
...
- As a Demand Planner, you will be a key member of the Supply Chain team responsible for developing, maintaining, and continuously improving demand forecasts that support production planning, inventory optimization, and customer service objectives. This role partners cross-functionally to align demand signals with supply capabilities and business goals.
...
- What you’ll do:
...
- Develop and maintain accurate short-, mid-, and long-term demand forecasts using historical data, market trends, and customer inputs.
...
- Lead demand review activities within the SIOP process, analyzing forecast changes, risks, and opportunities, and recommending actions to meet service and inventory targets.
...
- Analyze forecast accuracy, bias, and key demand drivers; identify root causes and implement continuous improvement actions.
...
- Prepare and present weekly and monthly reporting on forecast accuracy, demand trends, and planning assumptions to leadership.
...
- Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, Product Management, and Operations to incorporate promotions, new program assumptions, customer commitments, and market intelligence into forecasts.
...
- Monitor demand variability and identify risks related to forecast volatility, capacity constraints, or customer changes.
...
- Maintain accurate demand planning and item master data within the ERP and planning systems.
...
- Support inventory optimization by balancing forecast accuracy, service levels, and working capital objectives.
...
- Support New Product Introductions (NPI) by developing ramp-up/ramp-down forecasts and managing lifecycle transitions and phase-in/phase-out plans.
...
This role could be the next step in your career if you demonstrate the following experience:
...
- Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution
- Minimum of 1 year of related professional experience
...
You will set yourself apart by demonstrating some or all of the following:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain Management
- ERP Experience, SAP and Kinaxis Preferred
- CPIM or other supply chain certification
- Experience in a supply chain buying, planning, or scheduling role
- Basic knowledge of Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma concepts
...
Keys to role success:
...
- Ability to demonstrate knowledge of ERP requirements and customer order processing
- Ability to demonstrate problem solving and analytical skills
- Excellent interpersonal skills, including strong verbal and written communication skills
- Ability to present data effectively to support recommendations regarding production plan/master schedule
...
- Ability to work in a growth oriented and fast paced work environment.
...
- Ability to adjust work priorities to meet continuously changing schedules
- Ability to set priorities and accomplish goals within time constraints.
...
- Maintaining sense of urgency to customers’ requirements.
...
- Microsoft Office proficiency
...
- #LI-
...
- The application window for this position is anticipated to close

highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
AI and ML solutions

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...

Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
